title: Captain America: The First Avenger
synopsis: Steve Rogers, a scrawny kid from Brooklyn, is transformed into a super-soldier to fight HYDRA and the villainous Red Skull during World War II. Sets the entire MCU in motion.

title: Iron Man
synopsis: Billionaire weapons manufacturer Tony Stark builds a powered suit of armor to escape captivity, then becomes Iron Man to fight evil — and discovers a far greater conspiracy.

title: The Incredible Hulk
synopsis: Bruce Banner, hunted by the U.S. military, struggles to cure himself of the Hulk while a shadowy general creates an even bigger monster: the Abomination.

title: Iron Man 2
synopsis: Tony Stark faces a Russian physicist out for revenge and a rival weapons manufacturer while the government pushes him to hand over the Iron Man technology.

title: Thor
synopsis: Thor, the arrogant prince of Asgard, is stripped of his power and cast to Earth, where he must prove himself worthy again while Loki schemes to take the throne.

title: The Avengers
synopsis: Nick Fury assembles Iron Man, Captain America, Thor, Hulk, Black Widow and Hawkeye to stop Loki from using the Tesseract to bring an alien army to Earth.

title: Thor: The Dark World
synopsis: An ancient enemy, the Dark Elves, seeks to plunge the universe into darkness using a weapon called the Aether — and Thor must ally with the treacherous Loki to stop them.

title: Guardians of the Galaxy
synopsis: Outlaw Peter Quill teams up with a motley group of space misfits — Gamora, Drax, Rocket and Groot — to prevent a powerful orb from falling into the wrong hands.

title: Captain America: The Winter Soldier
synopsis: Steve Rogers uncovers a massive conspiracy within SHIELD and faces a deadly assassin known as the Winter Soldier, whose identity reveals a heartbreaking truth.

title: Iron Man 3
synopsis: Tony Stark, suffering PTSD after the Battle of New York, faces a mysterious terrorist called the Mandarin whose attacks push Tony to his very limits.

title: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2
synopsis: Peter Quill discovers the truth about his celestial father Ego, while the Guardians battle their own complicated family dynamics across the galaxy.

title: I Am Groot S1 & S2
synopsis: A series of comedy shorts following Baby Groot's misadventures and interactions with alien creatures. Entirely standalone, light-hearted fun between bigger MCU entries.

title: Avengers: Age of Ultron
synopsis: Tony Stark's experiment to create a peacekeeping AI, Ultron, goes catastrophically wrong. The Avengers must stop their creation before it causes extinction — and recruit two new heroes in the process.

title: Doctor Strange
synopsis: Brilliant but arrogant neurosurgeon Stephen Strange has a career-ending accident and discovers a hidden world of magic and alternate dimensions, becoming a powerful sorcerer.

title: Ant-Man
synopsis: Ex-con Scott Lang must embrace his inner hero and help his mentor Dr. Hank Pym pull off a heist using a suit that allows the wearer to shrink to the size of an ant.

title: Captain America: Civil War
synopsis: The Avengers fracture over government oversight — Iron Man supports the Sokovia Accords while Captain America refuses to sign. Introduces Black Panther and Spider-Man to the MCU.

title: Black Widow
synopsis: Set after Civil War, Natasha Romanoff confronts her past and the brutal spy program that made her who she is — the Red Room — alongside her estranged family.

title: Black Panther
synopsis: T'Challa returns to Wakanda to claim the throne, but a ruthless outsider with a legitimate claim challenges him — forcing T'Challa to decide what kind of king he wants to be.

title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
synopsis: 15-year-old Peter Parker tries to balance high school life with being Spider-Man, while trying to impress Tony Stark and stop a black-market weapons dealer called the Vulture.

title: Ant-Man & the Wasp
synopsis: Scott Lang joins forces with Hope van Dyne as the Wasp to uncover secrets from the quantum realm — including a mysterious ghost who can phase through solid matter.

title: Thor: Ragnarok
synopsis: Thor is stranded on a trash planet, loses his hammer, and must escape from the grandmaster's arena to stop the goddess of death Hela from conquering Asgard — with Hulk's help.
prerequisites: Thor: The Dark World, Age of Ultron

title: Avengers: Infinity War
synopsis: Thanos, armed with the Infinity Gauntlet, hunts all six Infinity Stones. The Avengers and Guardians unite across the universe to stop him — and suffer their greatest defeat.

title: Captain Marvel
synopsis: Carol Danvers discovers her past as an Air Force pilot and unlocks the full extent of her cosmic powers while caught in the middle of a galactic war between the Kree and the Skrulls.

title: Avengers: Endgame
synopsis: Five years after Thanos wiped out half of all life, the surviving Avengers attempt a time heist to undo the snap in a desperate final stand that brings the Infinity Saga to a close.

title: WandaVision S1
synopsis: Wanda Maximoff and Vision live an idyllic suburban life — but their sitcom reality isn't what it seems. A mystery unravels that redefines Wanda's power and shatters her world. 9 episodes.

title: The Falcon & the Winter Soldier S1
synopsis: Sam Wilson and Bucky Barnes navigate a divided post-blip world while confronting a radical new group, the Flag Smashers, and a man who has stolen the Captain America shield. 6 episodes.

title: Spider-Man: Far From Home
synopsis: Peter Parker tries to take a vacation in Europe after Endgame but is pulled into a mission with Nick Fury to stop Elemental creatures — and meets the mysterious Mysterio.

title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
synopsis: Peter asks Doctor Strange to make the world forget he is Spider-Man. The spell goes wrong, tearing open the multiverse and bringing villains and heroes from other realities into his world.

title: Hawkeye S1
synopsis: Retired Avenger Clint Barton is forced out of retirement when his Ronin past catches up with him in New York. He teams up with aspiring archer Kate Bishop to stop the Tracksuit Mafia. 6 episodes.

title: Guardians Holiday Special
synopsis: The Guardians of the Galaxy celebrate Christmas by kidnapping Kevin Bacon as a gift for Peter Quill — a hilarious, heartwarming holiday special that introduces Mantis's big secret.

title: Loki S1
synopsis: The Variant Loki is captured by the TVA — the Time Variance Authority — and must help them track down a rogue variant of himself while uncovering a vast conspiracy about the sacred timeline. 6 episodes.

title: Ant-Man & the Wasp: Quantumania
synopsis: Scott Lang and his family are pulled into the Quantum Realm where they encounter Kang the Conqueror — the most powerful villain the MCU has faced yet, with terrifying implications for the multiverse.

title: Loki S2
synopsis: Loki grapples with time-slipping across different eras of the TVA while fighting to save his friends and the multiverse itself from a catastrophic collapse. 6 episodes.

title: What If...? S1
synopsis: An animated anthology exploring alternate MCU timelines: what if Peggy Carter got the serum? What if T'Challa became Star-Lord? Each episode reframes a familiar story with startling results. 9 episodes.

title: What If...? S2
synopsis: More animated alternate realities, including Captain Carter in the MCU timeline and a Captain America who never got the serum. Continues the Watcher's anthology. 9 episodes.

title: What If...? S3
synopsis: The final season of What If brings together characters from across the multiverse for a grand finale, paying off threads from all three seasons in a big animated event. 10 episodes.

title: Deadpool & Wolverine
synopsis: Wade Wilson is recruited by the TVA and teams up with a variant Wolverine to save his universe — and deliver the MCU's most irreverent, fourth-wall-breaking, R-rated adventure yet.

title: Thor: Love and Thunder
synopsis: Thor embarks on a journey of self-discovery while Jane Foster wields Mjolnir as the Mighty Thor. The villain Gorr the God Butcher hunts deities across the cosmos.

title: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3
synopsis: The Guardians must protect Rocket Raccoon from his traumatic past and the High Evolutionary, the monster who created him. An emotional, definitive finale for the original team.

title: Black Panther: Wakanda Forever
synopsis: Wakanda mourns the loss of T'Challa and faces a new threat from Talokan, an underwater nation led by the powerful Namor — forcing Shuri to decide her own destiny as a warrior.

title: Moon Knight S1
synopsis: Steven Grant, a mild-mannered gift shop employee, discovers he shares a body with mercenary Marc Spector — an avatar of the Egyptian moon god Khonshu. 6 episodes.

title: Shang-Chi & the Legend of the Ten Rings
synopsis: Shaun, a parking valet living in San Francisco, is drawn into the world of the Ten Rings organization when agents from his past find him — and he learns the truth about his father Wenwu.

title: Doctor Strange: Multiverse of Madness
synopsis: Strange and America Chavez travel across the multiverse pursued by a terrifying threat. This Doctor Strange sequel is the most horror-inflected MCU film, directed by Sam Raimi.

title: Agatha All Along S1
synopsis: The Scarlet Witch's nemesis Agatha Harkness assembles a ragtag coven to run the Witches Road — a deadly gauntlet that promises to restore lost powers. 9 episodes.

title: Eternals
synopsis: Ten immortal beings who have secretly lived on Earth for 7,000 years reunite to face an emerging threat that could trigger the end of the planet — and uncover a devastating truth about their mission.

title: She-Hulk: Attorney at Law S1
synopsis: Jennifer Walters, a lawyer and Bruce Banner's cousin, acquires Hulk powers and must balance her personal and professional life while handling superhuman legal cases. 9 episodes.

title: Ms. Marvel S1
synopsis: 16-year-old Kamala Khan, a Pakistani-American fan of the Avengers from Jersey City, discovers she has unique powers and must figure out who she is — as a hero and as a person. 6 episodes.

title: The Marvels
synopsis: Carol Danvers, Monica Rambeau and Kamala Khan find their powers entangled, forcing them to swap places every time they use them. A light, fast-paced team-up across the cosmos.

title: Secret Invasion S1
synopsis: Nick Fury returns to Earth to face a faction of Skrulls who have been secretly infiltrating human society for years — a grounded spy thriller in the MCU. 6 episodes.

title: Echo S1
synopsis: Maya Lopez returns to her hometown of Tamaha, Oklahoma, where she reconnects with her Native American heritage while a dark past and Kingpin's criminal empire catch up to her. 5 episodes.

title: Daredevil: Born Again S1
synopsis: Matt Murdock returns as Daredevil in the MCU proper, picking up threads from the Netflix era while Wilson Fisk rises to become New York's mayor in a gripping crime drama. 9 episodes.

title: Daredevil: Born Again S2
synopsis: The second season of Daredevil: Born Again continues Matt Murdock's battle against Wilson Fisk and expands the street-level side of the MCU further. 9 episodes.

title: Captain America: Brave New World
synopsis: Sam Wilson leads as the new Captain America, navigating international intrigue while a dangerous conspiracy involving the Red Hulk and Adamantium threatens global stability.

title: Ironheart S1
synopsis: Riri Williams, a genius MIT student who built her own Iron Man suit, ventures to Chicago where she encounters the mysterious Hood and gets pulled into a dangerous magical conspiracy. 6 episodes.

title: Thunderbolts*
synopsis: A group of reformed villains and antiheroes — including Yelena Belova, US Agent, Ghost and the Winter Soldier — are assembled for a mission that uncovers a threat none of them expected.

title: Fantastic Four: First Steps
synopsis: The Fantastic Four make their MCU debut in a retro-futuristic 1960s-inspired setting, facing the world-devouring Galactus and his herald, Silver Surfer, in a cosmic spectacle.

title: Wonder Man S1
synopsis: Simon Williams, a fading Hollywood actor, is recruited by MODOK to become Wonder Man. A satirical look at the entertainment industry through the lens of superhero action.

title: Werewolf by Night
synopsis: A group of hunters gather at a mysterious manor to compete for a powerful relic — but one among them is a monster hunter with a monstrous secret. A black-and-white horror tribute.

title: Eyes of Wakanda S1
synopsis: An animated anthology following Wakandan warriors throughout history as they retrieve Vibranium weapons from around the world — expanding the mythology of the Black Panther universe.

title: Marvel Zombies S1
synopsis: Set in an alternate MCU reality overrun by a zombie plague, a group of young heroes — including Kamala Khan — must fight to survive in a horror-tinged animated series for mature audiences.

title: The Punisher: One Last Kill
synopsis: A Marvel Television Special Presentation bringing Jon Bernthal's Frank Castle back to the street-level MCU before his next big-screen appearance.

title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day
synopsis: Peter Parker begins a new chapter alone in New York City after the world forgot his identity, with his life as a full-time Spider-Man pushing him into a dangerous new threat.

title: VisionQuest
synopsis: The next chapter of the WandaVision corner of the MCU follows Vision after the events that left White Vision searching for his identity and memories.

title: Wonder Man S2
synopsis: The confirmed second season of Wonder Man continues Simon Williams' Hollywood-superhero story in Marvel Television's Disney+ lineup.

title: Avengers: Doomsday
synopsis: The Avengers return for the first half of the Multiverse Saga finale, directed by the Russo brothers and featuring Doctor Doom as the central threat.

title: Daredevil: Born Again S3
synopsis: The confirmed third season continues Matt Murdock and Wilson Fisk's street-level conflict after Born Again's second season.

title: Avengers: Secret Wars
synopsis: The Multiverse Saga reaches its theatrical climax in the follow-up to Avengers: Doomsday, arriving as the next major Avengers event.

title: Agent Carter (One-Shot)
synopsis: A short film following Peggy Carter one year after WWII, proving her worth to SSR colleagues who underestimate her — a precursor to the full Agent Carter series.

title: Agent Carter S1 & S2
synopsis: Peggy Carter works as an SSR agent after the war, fighting Howard Stark's enemies and later an adversary in Hollywood. 10 episodes across 2 seasons of spy-era adventure.

title: A Funny Thing Happened on the Way to Thor's Hammer
synopsis: A brief comedic short following Agent Coulson stopping a convenience store robbery on his way to the Thor investigation. Charm in under 4 minutes.

title: The Consultant
synopsis: Coulson and Sitwell reveal the behind-the-scenes deal that kept the Abomination out of the Avengers Initiative — a clever retcon connecting The Incredible Hulk to the wider MCU.

title: Item 47
synopsis: A couple discovers a Chitauri weapon from the Battle of New York and uses it to rob banks, attracting SHIELD's attention. The first short to hint at the wider post-Avengers world.

title: Agents of SHIELD S1 Eps 1–7
synopsis: Coulson's new SHIELD team investigates superhuman activity in the post-Avengers world. Episodes 1–7 establish the team and introduce the Centipede organization threatening SHIELD.

title: Agents of SHIELD S1 Eps 8–12
synopsis: The mystery of Coulson's resurrection deepens as the team faces escalating threats. These 5 episodes tie in with Thor: The Dark World's fallout.

title: All Hail the King
synopsis: Trevor Slattery, imprisoned after Iron Man 3, is interviewed in jail — until a mysterious visitor arrives with very bad news about the real Mandarin. A short that reshapes Iron Man 3's legacy.

title: Agents of SHIELD S1 Eps 13–15
synopsis: The team uncovers more about the Clairvoyant and the mysterious GH compound, raising the stakes in the first season's escalating conspiracy.

title: Agents of SHIELD S1 Ep 16
synopsis: A pivotal episode that directly ties into the events of Captain America: The Winter Soldier — watch this immediately before or after CATWS for maximum impact.

title: Agents of SHIELD S1 Eps 17–22 & S2 Eps 1–2
synopsis: HYDRA's infiltration of SHIELD tears Coulson's team apart. These post-Winter Soldier episodes are dramatically more intense and pay off the season-long conspiracy.

title: Agents of SHIELD S2 Ep 3
synopsis: A standalone episode deepening the new SHIELD's mission as Coulson's team begins to rebuild after the HYDRA fallout.

title: Agents of SHIELD S2 Eps 4–5
synopsis: More fallout from HYDRA's rise as the team investigates alien writing and Coulson's mysterious compulsion deepens.

title: Daredevil S1
synopsis: Blind lawyer Matt Murdock fights crime in Hell's Kitchen as Daredevil by night, battling the criminal kingpin Wilson Fisk in one of Marvel's darkest and most acclaimed stories. 13 episodes.

title: Jessica Jones S1
synopsis: Hard-drinking private investigator Jessica Jones hunts a mind-controlling villain named Kilgrave who has terrorized her before — a dark, gripping psychological thriller. 13 episodes.

title: Agents of SHIELD S2 Eps 6–19
synopsis: The team tracks Inhumans and deals with a splinter SHIELD faction. The Inhuman mythology that will dominate later seasons is built here over 14 episodes.

title: Agents of SHIELD S2 Eps 20–22
synopsis: Season 2 finale — the two SHIELD factions clash and a major Inhuman transformation reshapes the status quo heading into Phase 3 of the show.

title: WHiH Newsfront S1
synopsis: An in-universe digital series from WHiH World News, covering Avengers-related events. Short web episodes that add texture to the MCU's media landscape.

title: Daredevil S2
synopsis: Matt Murdock faces the Punisher's brutal war on crime and the return of Elektra while the Hand rises as a new supernatural threat. Introduces Frank Castle in a landmark performance. 13 episodes.

title: Luke Cage S1
synopsis: Former convict Luke Cage, a bulletproof man with super strength, becomes an unwilling hero in Harlem when a crime boss threatens his community. 13 episodes.

title: Agents of SHIELD S3 Eps 1–10
synopsis: The ATCU hunts Inhumans while Coulson searches for a dangerous Inhuman in space. The first half of Season 3 deepens the Inhuman world and introduces the mythical Hive.

title: Iron Fist S1
synopsis: Danny Rand, heir to a corporate empire and master of the Iron Fist, returns to New York after 15 years to reclaim his company and fight the Hand. 13 episodes.

title: Agents of SHIELD S3 Eps 11–14
synopsis: Hive's plan begins to take shape as the team suffers a major loss — these four episodes represent the emotional heart of Season 3.

title: WHiH Newsfront S2 Ep 1
synopsis: A WHiH interview segment with Christine Everhart covering the Avengers and the political debate around superhero accountability — tying into Civil War's themes.

title: Agents of SHIELD S3 Eps 15–16
synopsis: The stakes escalate as Hive's power grows and the team is forced to make impossible choices to protect the world.

title: WHiH Newsfront S2 Ep 2
synopsis: Another WHiH segment covering the political aftermath of Age of Ultron and the Sokovia Accords debate that will drive Captain America: Civil War.

title: Agents of SHIELD S3 Eps 17–18
synopsis: The team races to stop Hive before his plan reaches the point of no return in two tense penultimate episodes.

title: WHiH Newsfront S2 Eps 3–5
synopsis: The final WHiH digital shorts covering pre-Civil War tensions, including commentary on the Sokovia Accords and superhero registration from an in-universe media perspective.

title: The Defenders S1
synopsis: Daredevil, Jessica Jones, Luke Cage and Iron Fist unite to face the Hand and its mysterious leader Alexandra in New York City's biggest street-level crisis. 8 episodes.

title: Agents of SHIELD S3 Ep 19
synopsis: A standalone bottle episode taking place largely on the Quinjet as the team processes loss and prepares for the Season 3 finale.

title: Agents of SHIELD S3 Eps 20–22
synopsis: The Season 3 finale pits Coulson's team against Hive in a devastating conclusion that permanently changes the team's lineup heading into Phase 3.

title: Inhumans S1
synopsis: The Inhuman royal family of Attilan is overthrown by Maximus and scattered across Hawaii. Largely standalone but expands the Inhuman mythology introduced in SHIELD. 8 episodes.

title: The Punisher S1
synopsis: Frank Castle, after exacting revenge for his family's murder, uncovers a conspiracy that leads back to government and military corruption. One of Marvel Netflix's most intense series. 13 episodes.

title: Cloak & Dagger S1
synopsis: Two teenagers in New Orleans — Tandy Bowen with light daggers and Tyrone Johnson with teleportation — discover their linked powers and a vast corporate conspiracy. 10 episodes.

title: Agents of SHIELD S4 Eps 1–8
synopsis: The Ghost Rider arc begins — Robbie Reyes joins the team while Daisy goes rogue. These 8 episodes are widely considered among the best in the series.

title: Agents of SHIELD: Slingshot S1
synopsis: A digital miniseries of 6 short episodes following Elena 'Yo-Yo' Rodriguez between Seasons 3 and 4, fleshing out her backstory and motivations.

title: Agents of SHIELD S4 Eps 9–22
synopsis: The LMD and Framework arcs — Daisy and team face Life Model Decoys and then a virtual reality dystopia. Season 4 is a creative high point for the show. 14 episodes.

title: Jessica Jones S2
synopsis: Jessica investigates the mad scientist who gave her powers and faces unexpected personal revelations in a more introspective second season. 13 episodes.

title: Agents of SHIELD S5 Eps 1–10
synopsis: The team is sent to a dystopian future where Earth has been destroyed and humans serve alien overlords called the Kree. The space-set opening of Season 5 is a bold sci-fi swing.

title: Luke Cage S2
synopsis: Luke Cage protects Harlem from a Jamaican crime lord while battling for the soul of his neighbourhood in a musically rich second season. 13 episodes.

title: Iron Fist S2
synopsis: Danny Rand faces a new Triad war in New York and the return of Davos while questioning his role as the Iron Fist in a more focused second season. 10 episodes.

title: Daredevil S3
synopsis: Matt Murdock, broken and faithless, re-emerges as a darker Daredevil to stop Wilson Fisk — who has secretly taken control of the FBI from inside prison. Widely considered Marvel Netflix's best season. 13 episodes.

title: Cloak & Dagger S2
synopsis: Tandy and Tyrone face a new threat — the Mayhem villain and a human trafficking ring — as their powers and relationship evolve in a more confident second season. 10 episodes.

title: Agents of SHIELD S5 Eps 11–13
synopsis: The team begins to piece together how Earth was destroyed in the future timeline and whether they can prevent it — a mystery-box set of episodes.

title: Runaways S1 & S2 & S3 Eps 1–4
synopsis: Six teenagers discover their parents are secretly a criminal cult called the Pride and go on the run. Seasons 1–2 plus the first 4 episodes of Season 3. 33 episodes.

title: The Punisher S2
synopsis: Frank Castle protects a mysterious teenager on the run while his old identity catches up with him. The final Netflix Punisher season before the character moved to the MCU proper. 13 episodes.

title: Jessica Jones S3
synopsis: Jessica Jones faces a serial killer obsessed with justice while navigating a complicated relationship with her half-sister Trish. The final season of the acclaimed Netflix series. 13 episodes.

title: Agents of SHIELD S5 Eps 14–18
synopsis: The race to prevent Earth's destruction accelerates as Graviton emerges and the team is split over whether the future can truly be changed.

title: Agents of SHIELD S5 Eps 19–22
synopsis: Season 5 finale — the team makes the choice that defines their fate, in a deeply emotional conclusion to one of the show's strongest seasons.

title: Runaways S3 Eps 5–10
synopsis: The final stretch of Runaways Season 3 brings the Hostel crew face-to-face with Morgan le Fay in a magical finale that closes the chapter on this beloved group of young heroes.

title: Agents of SHIELD S6 & S7
synopsis: Season 6 explores the consequences of the Infinity War snap for SHIELD, while Season 7 — the final season — sends the team back in time in a love letter to the whole series. 26 combined episodes.

title: Helstrom S1
synopsis: The son and daughter of a mysterious and powerful serial killer use their unique abilities to hunt the worst of humanity in this darker, horror-inflected series. 10 episodes.

title: The Daily Bugle S1 & S2
synopsis: An in-universe web series presenting J. Jonah Jameson's Daily Bugle coverage of Spider-Man and Avengers events. Short comedic episodes that add texture to the MCU's world.

title: Your Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man S1
synopsis: An animated series set in an alternate MCU continuity featuring a younger Peter Parker learning the ropes as Spider-Man before the events of the live-action films. 10 episodes.

title: X-Men '97 S1
synopsis: Marvel Animation revival of the 1990s X-Men series. Optional but highly recommended multiverse-side viewing before X-Men '97 S2. 10 episodes.

title: X-Men '97 S2
synopsis: The second season of Marvel Animation's revival continues the animated X-Men continuity outside the main MCU timeline.

title: Your Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man S2
synopsis: The second season continues the alternate-continuity animated Spider-Man story with Peter Parker's next year of adventures.

title: Venom
synopsis: Sony's Spider-Man Universe begins with Eddie Brock bonding to the alien symbiote Venom. Optional multiverse-side watch that later connects to Spider-Man multiverse events.

title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
synopsis: Eddie Brock faces serial killer Cletus Kasady after he becomes Carnage. Includes a post-credits multiverse beat that ties directly to No Way Home-era crossover logic.

title: Venom: The Last Dance
synopsis: The third Venom film closes Eddie and Venom's trilogy arc in Sony's continuity while remaining optional for MCU completion.

title: Morbius
synopsis: Dr. Michael Morbius gains vampiric powers while seeking a cure for his blood disease. Optional Sony-side multiverse viewing for Spider-Man adjacent lore.

title: Madame Web
synopsis: Cassandra Webb discovers clairvoyant powers and protects three future Spider-Women in Sony's alternate continuity. Optional, but useful for broader Spider-verse completionists.

title: Kraven the Hunter
synopsis: Sergei Kravinoff's origin story reframes one of Spider-Man's iconic villains in Sony's standalone continuity. Optional side watch for Sony Marvel coverage.

title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
synopsis: Miles Morales becomes Spider-Man in a celebrated animated multiverse story that expands Marvel's spider-variant concept beyond the MCU timeline.

title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
synopsis: Miles joins a larger Spider-Society across dimensions, deepening animated multiverse lore that complements MCU multiverse themes.

title: Spider-Man (2017) S1–S3
synopsis: Marvel Animation's 2017 Spider-Man series offers a modernized Peter Parker arc across three seasons. Optional for viewers building a fuller Marvel + Sony-adjacent Spider watchlist.

title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Maximum Venom
synopsis: The final season/event arc of Marvel's 2017 Spider-Man run focuses on symbiote mythology and Venom escalation. Optional animated companion for Venom-era interests.

title: Spider-Man
synopsis: Sam Raimi's original Spider-Man film introduces Tobey Maguire as Peter Parker facing Green Goblin. Core legacy multiverse watch for Sony Marvel history.

title: Spider-Man 2
synopsis: Peter Parker battles Doctor Octopus while balancing sacrifice and responsibility. Widely considered a defining Sony Marvel classic.

title: Spider-Man 3
synopsis: Raimi trilogy finale featuring Sandman, New Goblin, and the symbiote arc that helped shape later Venom mythology.

title: The Amazing Spider-Man
synopsis: Sony reboot starring Andrew Garfield as Peter Parker in a new continuity centered around Oscorp and the Lizard.

title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
synopsis: Andrew Garfield sequel introducing Electro and escalating legacy continuity elements later echoed in No Way Home.

title: Spider-Man Noir
synopsis: Spider-Noir live-action Marvel project in Sony's Spider-related slate. Season 1 released with 8 episodes, available in black-and-white and color versions.

title: Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse (TBA)
synopsis: Upcoming conclusion to the animated Spider-Verse trilogy, included for complete Sony Marvel viewing roadmap.
